title: NoStrenght2
description: Minecraft plugin that blocks Strength 2 potions while keeping Strength 1 working
body:
Minecraft plugin that blocks Strength 2 potions while keeping Strength 1 working.

good for smps or any projects idk
blocks strenght2 throwable/lingering/drinkable potions
strenght 1 works fine
Minecraft 1.21+ Paper
Setup:
Drop the jar in your plugins folder and restart the server.
